_comment: Add any number of entries to 'groups'. Fill every empty agent ID string before running.
per_value : creates one group per unique value found in 'source_column'.
Optional 'filters' narrows the rows considered before the groupby.
filtered  : creates one fixed group whose members match ALL entries in 'filters'.
value = '<literal>'     exact match on the cell value (case-sensitive, trimmed)
One group per TEAM, Finance BU only:
One fixed group for Finance AND Trading team only:

groups._comment: One group + channel per unique BUSINESS_UNIT value in the Excel
One group for every row where ALPHA_TESTER is truthy
groups.name: Alpha Testers
groups.description: Early-access users with enhanced permissions and exclusive agents.
